name: wncore-radio
description: WNCORE Radio - Production-ready ARG platform with global radio streaming
author: WNCORE Broadcasting

scripts.minify:js: terser main.js admin.js wrongness.js improvements.js -c -m -o dist/main.min.js && echo '✅ JS minified'
scripts.minify:css: csso style.css -o dist/style.min.css && echo '✅ CSS minified'
scripts.deploy:docker: docker build -t wncore-radio . && docker run -p 3000:3000 wncore-radio
scripts.optimize: npm run build && npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
scripts.postbuild: echo '✅ Build complete. Run: npm run serve:dist'
scripts.postoptimize: echo '✅ Optimization complete. Deploy with: npm run deploy:vercel'
